_comment: SymbolicDag: cross-node image pipeline with the OUTPUT RETURNED to node 0.
node 0: load_images -> img_src (decode+rotate+grayscale, RDMA-stream each round to node 1)
node 1: img_dst (equalize+blur+export -> OUTPUT_IO_SLOT 1, RDMA-recv each round)
node 0: save_images (Output split_records) -- depends on img_dst ON NODE 1.
Because save_images (node 0) depends on img_dst (node 1) and img_dst's output is
the terminal OUTPUT_IO_SLOT (1), the Partitioner auto-injects a return edge:
rs_img_dst_to_0  RemoteSend  { slot:1, slot_kind:Io }  on node 1
rr_img_dst_from_1 RemoteRecv { slot:<recv>, slot_kind:Io } on node 0
and repoints save_images at the recv slot. The 3 processed images (length-prefixed
I/O records) are returned to node 0 and split_records fans record i -> paths[i].
No explicit free nodes: slot 1 is auto-reclaimed after its consumer (the injected
RemoteSend) completes, so the send can't race a premature free.
